positive: A vibrant, bioluminescent cosmic forest scene rendered in a stylized, neo-geometric art deco style. The central composition features enormous, crystalline mushroom formations and branching, ethereal trees that emit soft, glowing cyan and magenta light. Scattered constellations and stylized milky way dust float through the forest canopy. The overall aesthetic should resemble a high-contrast, clean line illustration suitable for screen printing on apparel, utilizing perfect symmetry and clean silhouettes. Focus on deep indigo, vibrant electric blue, and glowing neon accents against a dark, matte background. Highly detailed, symmetrical mandala layout, vaporwave aesthetic, volumetric lighting.
